title: sub_GAME_7F03E27C NATIVE_PORT reimpl drops projectile room-source indirection and restructures top branch

history.note: Retail sub_GAME_7F03E27C at 0x7F03E27C branches at top level on prop->flags bit 8 (andi at 0x7F03E2A0, beqz at 0x7F03E2A4). In the flags-bit-8 path it seeds room source from prop->rooms at prop offset 0x2C, and when prop->type is obj/weapon/door with an active projectile (obj->runtime_bitflags bit 0x80 at 0x7F03E2DC and projectile word bit 8 at 0x7F03E2F4) it redirects the room source to projectile+0xCC at 0x7F03E304; the else path calls sub_GAME_7F0B21B0 with prop->stan, pos.x, pos.z, arg3. The live NATIVE_PORT body instead branches first on prop->type != PROP_TYPE_CHR, only reads prop->rooms when type==CHR with flag 8, drops the projectile+0xCC room-source indirection entirely, substitutes chrpropCollectRoomsNearStan for sub_GAME_7F0B21B0, and adds non-retail behaviors (a prop==NULL guard, a num_rooms<=0 stan->room fallback, and a num_rooms>max clamp). Net effect: non-CHR props with flag 8 and active projectiles get a different room membership than retail, affecting LOS and render-room assignment. Function is a known partial reimpl (PORT_FIXME_STUBS, PD note lists los_find_* candidates); warrants dedicated deep audit before a fix.
